title: Banana
description: A little goes a long way. This conditioner is your answer to a-peeling locks, with nourishing fresh banana, it's a great shampoo and conditioner for dry hair.
ingredients: Musa Paradisiaca Fruit (Fresh Organic Fair Trade Bananas)
Olea Europaea Fruit Oil (Organic Extra Virgin Olive Oil)
Dipteryx Odorata Seed Extract (Tonka Seed Extract)

images.alt: Banana. A neatly smudged swatch of thick, creamy, ivory-coloured hair conditioner.

The image shows the model's arms stretched into the centre holding the white, LUSH Version-themed packed pot of the Banana conditioner. One of their hands is scooping the product out. There is a teal background.

The image shows the model from the side while facing away, under running shower water. Their hair is wet and has been shampooed already. They are now running the Banana conditioner through the lengths and ends of their hair.

The image shows the model facing away from the camera while standing under running shower water. Their hair is wet and has been shampooed already. They are now running the Banana conditioner through the lengths and ends of their hair.
The model is on a teal background with a cream-coloured tank top. They have light brown, shoulder-length, freshly-dried hair which looks shiny and healthy and is being fanned with air.
